draft.subject: Streamlining your safety compliance follow-ups
draft.body:
Hi Brian,

Life safety companies spend significant time on follow-ups—compliance checks, inspection reminders, customer notifications. Most of that's templated and rule-based.

We automate it. An AI system schedules inspections, sends clients their due-date reminders, and tracks completion. Your team handles the actual inspections and complex issues.

One life safety firm cut their follow-up overhead by 40% while improving on-time rates.

Worth a quick conversation about what this could do for Innovative Life Safety Solutions?

Kevin Starr
Founder, Starr & Partners

personalization_notes: Referenced life safety compliance automation, named the company, focused on scheduling/follow-up pain points typical in that industry
